data.title: $1.2B Vanishes from Bitcoin ETFs — But Schwab Sees a Bullish Signal
data.description:
US spot Bitcoin ETFs saw over $1. 2B in outflows this week as BTC dropped sharply. However, Charles Schwab reported a 90% surge in crypto-related engagement.

The post $1. 2B Vanishes from Bitcoin ETFs — But Schwab Sees a Bullish Signal first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/10/18/bitcoin-etfs-bleed-1-2-b-schwab-bullish/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=bitcoin-etfs-bleed-1-2-b-schwab-bullish

data.title:
$BTC Did a good job recovering some ground on Friday before the CME close.

This makes it so we're likely to stick around this ~$107K level during the weekend.

Stocks ended up closing near their weekly highs as gold came off a bit.

For me BTC has to hold on to its ~$105K area

data.title: Hackers Exploiting WhatsApp To Steal Bank Customers’ Credentials, Warns Cybersecurity Researchers
data.description:
Cybersecurity researchers are warning about a dangerous new malware strain that targets banking customers by exploiting WhatsApp and SMS. Dubbed “GhostBat RAT,” the malicious software masquerades as legitimate government-related apps, tricking users into downloading infected Android files from GitHub or compromised websites.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/10/18/hackers-exploiting-whatsapp-to-steal-bank-customers-credentials-warns-cybersecurity-researchers/

data.title: 120K Bitcoin private keys cracked in a new hack
data.description:
A newly uncovered vulnerability in a widely used open-source Bitcoin library has led to the exposure of more than 120,000 private keys, according to a report by crypto wallet provider OneKey. The flaw was traced back to the Libbitcoin Explorer (bx) 3. x series, which allowed attackers to predict wallet private keys generated through insecure random […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/120k-bitcoin-private-keys-cracked-in-a-new-hack/

data.title: The SLERF contract price is 4 times higher than the on-chain price, which may be caused by the suspension of CEX deposits and arbitrage fluctuations.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, SLERF contracts reached a high of $0.43, while OKX spot prices peaked at $0.39, while the on-chain price was only $0.09167, a 4.6x price difference. The analysis suggests that this may be due to the ongoing SLERF contract swap and the suspension of deposits on OKX, which led to a sharp drop in spot market liquidity and a small price gap. As of the time of writing, the Binance contract price was $0.1872, the OKX spot price was $0.1934, and the on-chain price was $0.07093. Investors are also advised to exercise caution as the contract price may experience a sharp correction once the price index syncs with on-chain data.

data.title: Vitalik calls on ZK and FHE developers to measure efficiency loss with “performance ratio”
data.description: Ethereum founder Vitalik Buterin has published a post expressing his hope that more developers working on zero-knowledge proofs (ZK) and fully homomorphic encryption (FHE) will express performance overhead as the ratio of cryptographic computation time to raw computation time, rather than simply describing performance in terms of execution times per second. He noted that this approach is more hardware-independent and can help developers assess the efficiency tradeoffs associated with transitioning applications from trust-based to cryptographically secure. Vitalik believes that even if the ratio is still affected by hardware due to heterogeneous operations, the overhead factor remains a more informative metric.

data.title: Planet Noon News
data.description: 1. Wallets associated with Ethena's founder increased their holdings by 48 million ENA in three days; 2. SLERF briefly broke through $0.11, rising over 88% in 15 minutes; 3. Tom Lee: Market caution is rising, but there may be a reversal opportunity; 4. Binance will delist SLERF and CHZ perpetual contracts and adjust leverage; 5. Hackers panic-sold another 7,816 ETH, with cumulative losses exceeding $13.4 million; 8. Tether Gold's market capitalization exceeded $2 billion, setting a new record high; 9. "Big Brother Maji" increased his ETH long position again, adding 220,000 USDC to Hyperliquid; 10. Smart money Hanmancheol's real-time short position on COAI was liquidated, with losses exceeding $13.4 million in three days. 11. A suspected Blockchain Capital address deposited 28 million SKY tokens to CEXs such as Binance. 12. The Crypto Fear Index is currently at 23, placing it in the extreme panic range.

data.title: Wallets associated with Ethena's founder increased their holdings of 48 million ENA in three days
data.description: According to Onchain Lens, a multi-signature wallet associated with Ethena founder Guy Young (@gddog) has transferred a total of 48 million ENA tokens (worth approximately $20.41 million) from Binance and Bybit over the past three days. The on-chain address is 0xA7eEA194794D1BE1067C8fA7D8dbC8ca94A907a, and the wallet's specific purpose is currently unknown.
